title: Integration with LinkedIn Messaging for CRM
excerpt:
Is there any way to integrate Monday.com with LinkedIn Messaging? I know it should be possible because other CRMs can do this (Hubspot, Salesforce etc). 
Is anybody working on this as an app or integration?

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there any way to integrate Monday.com with LinkedIn Messaging? I know it should be possible because other CRMs can do this (Hubspot, Salesforce etc).

Is anybody working on this as an app or integration?

posts.author: grootwassink (Dave Grootwassink)
posts.cookedHtml: Did you ever get a response here?

posts.author: Ozgur (Ozgur)
posts.cookedHtml: Still no response on this? This feature will put Monday ahead of other CRMs.

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: LinkedIn is notorious for being difficult to work with from a developer perspective. They lock down their APIs very tightly, which makes it difficult to integrate with them. Unless you’re a big company (e.g. Salesforce, Hubspot, Monday, etc.), many of their features aren’t available to developers. If it wasn’t so difficult, my company would have created an integration for this and other LinkedIn features. Unfortunately, this is probably something Monday itself would need to add instead of an app developer.

posts.author: talishlafer (Tali)
posts.cookedHtml: Surprised this doesn’t have more traction, two years later. Other CRMs are able to offer this now. Monday is a big company. I’d hate to have to leave Monday CRM in place of something that does offer this integration.
